Are they really back? Yes, absolutely. We exclusively tested both new Mercurial models in Madrid (thanks to @Nike Football and @hubcommnet), as always, we want to give you every possible detail to build your own opinion: visuals, product insights, but most importantly our real feedback after using them on pitch, in matches and during specific training sessions that seriously “stressed” both boots. The new Superfly sends a very clear message as soon as you put it on: innovation built to deliver maximum propulsion. That’s exactly what the forefoot “plate” gives you, an aggressive sense of push and energy return that you can genuinely feel while sprinting. Vapor changes too and the almost “strange” feeling when wearing it for the first time is actually maximum comfort. Not because Mercurial Vapor has never been comfortable, but comfort has probably never been the first thing that comes to mind when thinking about this boot. Other details you’ll definitely want to know: Vapor is the lightest Mercurial ever made at just 130g, while Superfly features a very grippy upper despite being a product fully focused on speed and sprinting. Sizing? Stay relaxed with your usual Nike size, this is 100% true to size. We have a lot more content directly filmed in Madrid coming very soon, so as always, feel free to leave your questions in the comments. 매일 새벽 손으로 직접 만드는 수제만두, 젊은 사장님에게서 느껴지는 '할머니의 손맛' 📍망원 연만두  (주소: 서울 마포구 망원로 77 1층 연만두)   🔗네이버 지도: https://naver.me/5Kb3ejlY   🥟만두 한 판 8,500원 / 왕치즈군만두 1개 2,500원   📦택배 신청: 매주 월요일 오후 5시까지 문자 접수 (연락처: 010-5941- 7816)   망원시장의 소문난 만두 맛집 '연만두'. 많은 분이 연세 지긋한 할머니가 운영하실 거라 오해할 만큼 깊은 손맛을 자랑하는 곳입니다. 하지만 이곳의 주인공은 만두에 인생을 건 젊은 사장님이었는데요.  그 깊은 맛의 비결은 진심어린 정성에 있었습니다.  "기계는 재료를 뭉개버린다"는 철학 아래, 매일 새벽부터 나와 모든 재료를 일일이 손으로 버무리고 직접 빚으시더라구요. 재료 하나하나의 식감이 살아있는 꽉 찬 만두 속은 그렇게 사장님의 고집으로 완성됩니다.  워낙 정성껏 소량만 준비하기 때문에 금세 품절되기로 유명한데요. 방문 전 전화 주문이나 네이버 예약을 이용하시면 헛걸음 없이 바로 가져가실 수 있으니 꼭 참고하세요!   주문 즉시 튀겨주시는 치즈 군만두는 갓 튀겨낸 바삭한 식감 속에 고소하게 늘어나는 치즈와 만두 속의 조화가 그야말로 환상적입니다.. 정성과 맛, 어느 하나 빠지지 않는 망원동의 진정한 인생 만두를 만나보세요!   - Deep flavor hand-mixed every dawn: Finding 'Grandmother's Touch' in a Young Master 📍망원 연만두 'Yeon-Mandu' (77, Mangwon-ro, Mapo-gu, Seoul, Republic of Korea)   🔗 https://maps.app.goo.gl/jDhS1Q11mVTn1mBA9   'Yeon-Mandu' is a renowned dumpling spot near Mangwon Market, famous for a deep, traditional flavor that leads many to assume an elderly grandmother must be running the shop. Surprisingly, the true master behind these dumplings is a young man who has dedicated his life to this craft.   The secret to such profound flavor lies in his sincere devotion. Following his philosophy that "machines crush the ingredients' texture," he starts his day in the early hours of the dawn, hand-mixing and folding every single dumpling. This stubborn commitment is what creates the perfect filling, where the texture of each ingredient remains intact and vibrant.   Because each dumpling is made with such meticulous care in limited quantities, they are famous for selling out quickly. We highly recommend placing a phone order or using Naver Reservation before your visit to ensure you don't miss out! #92i #makeup Le “92i makeup” fait référence à un style de maquillage inspiré de l’univers du rap français, surtout lié à Booba et à son label 92i (“92 International”, en référence au département des Hauts-de-Seine). Sur les réseaux sociaux, ce terme désigne un maquillage au style urbain et confiant : teint très net, contouring marqué, regard intense avec eyeliner ou faux cils, lèvres bien dessinées et une attitude sûre de soi. Ce n’est pas une technique officielle de maquillage, mais plutôt une esthétique inspirée du luxe, de la street culture et d’une image forte et assumée.

Crispy tortilla cones filled with juicy spiced beef and topped with melted mozzarella 🧀🔥 The perfect crunchy snack or quick dinner that everyone will love. One bite and you’re hooked 🤤 Crispy Beef Cones (12 cones) Ingredients For the cones:  • 6 tortillas (25–30 cm / 10–12 inches)  • Toothpicks For the topping:  • Mozzarella cheese, 100 g  • Chopped parsley, 1 tsp For the beef mixture:  • Ground beef, 400 g(0.8lb)   • 1 yellow onion, finely chopped  • Garlic, 4 cloves, minced  • Red bell pepper, diced (about 1 small)  • Green bell pepper, diced (about 1 small)  • Tomato paste, 1 big tbsp   • Soy milk, 100 ml (~ ½ cup) Seasoning:  • Paprika, 1 tbsp  • Chili powder, 1 tsp  • Turmeric, 1 tsp  • Garlic powder, 1 tsp  • Black pepper, 1 tsp  • Garam masala, 1 tsp  • Salt, ½ tsp Instructions 1.⁠ ⁠Prepare the beef mixture:  • Heat a little oil in a pan over medium heat. Add the onion and sauté until soft.  • Add the minced garlic and cook 30 seconds until fragrant.  • Add the ground beef and cook until browned, breaking it apart as it cooks.  • Stir in tomato paste, soy milk, diced bell peppers, and all seasonings. Cook until slightly thickened. Remove from heat and let cool slightly. 2.⁠ ⁠Prepare the cones:  • Cut tortillas in half. Roll each half into a cone shape and secure the edge with a toothpick. Baking Method:  1. Preheat oven to 190°C (375°F).  2. Place cones on a baking tray lined with parchment paper. Lightly spray with cooking spray.  3. Bake for 10–12 minutes until crispy and golden.  4. Fill each cone with the beef mixture and top with mozzarella cheese.  5. Return to oven for 5 minutes until cheese melts.  6. Garnish with parsley and serve warm. Air Fryer Method:   1. Preheat air fryer to 180°C (356°F).  2. Lightly spray cones with cooking spray and place them in the air fryer basket. Make sure they don’t touch each other.  3. Air fry for 6–8 minutes until crispy and golden.  4. Carefully fill each cone with the beef mixture and top with mozzarella cheese.  5. Air fry again for 3–4 minutes until cheese melts.  6. Garnish with parsley and serve warm. #crispybeef #quickrecipes #EasyRecipes #lazydinner #beefcones

Мороженое в пакетах 🤤 Зип пакеты 28*5,5см Сливки 33% - 500 мл Сгущенка по вкусу - 150-200 Гр Добавки по желанию - клубника, фисташковая паста, кофе, шоколад, орешки или ничего 😀 Шоколад молочный - 200 гр (3 плитки берите) 1. Холодные сливки взбиваем до мягких пиков, добавляем сгущенку, перемешиваем 2. В каждый пакетик кладем 5 плиток шоколада, затем опускаем их в горячую воду, чтобы шоколад растаял 3. Распределяем шоколад по всему пакету, раскрываем пакет, заливаем мороженое (либо с помощью кондитерского мешка, либо как у меня на видео) 4. Убираем на 3 часа в морозилку Готово!
